title: ICAR IARI Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 11 May 2026 on the official website freejobalert.com . A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IARI Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST & women, 3 years for OBC

qualification.details: Master's degree in Genetics/ Plant Breeding/ Genetics and Plant Breeding/ Biotechnology/ Botany/ Life Sciences or allied subjects with 4/5 years bachelor's degree. Those with a 3 years bachelor's degree must have UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent. Research experience in handling Drosophila (fruit fly) is desirable.

selection_process: Screening of Applications Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Project Technical Support III Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR IARI Project Technical Support-III recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR IARI Project Technical Support-III position is 30th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Genetics, Plant Breeding, Biotechnology, Botany, Life Sciences, or allied subjects. A 4/5 year bachelor's degree is essential. For a 3-year bachelor's degree, UGC/CSIR/ICAR NET qualification or equivalent is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation is provided. Candidates belonging to SC/ST and women categories can get a relaxation of 5 years, while OBC candidates can avail a relaxation of 3 years in the upper age limit.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-III position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs 28,000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA) of Rs 8,400/-.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your application with all necessary details and documents and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a screening of applications, followed by an interview. Document verification will also be conducted for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the post of Project Technical Support-III in this recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q9. What is the duration of the contract?
faq.answer: The job is on a contract basis. The project end date is mentioned as 31st March 2027.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with a pincode of 110012.
